description_long: This is a carved pumpkin, commonly known as a jack-o'-lantern, with a classic orange body and a green stem on top. The front face features a traditional carved face with two large, rounded eyes and a jagged, smiling mouth, giving it a whimsical and slightly eerie expression. A purple worm is emerging from one of the eye sockets, adding a playful and slightly grotesque touch. Next to the pumpkin, there is a melted, off-white candle with a visible wick, suggesting the pumpkin may be used as a Halloween decoration. The pumpkin's surface is matte and slightly rough, with visible grooves and natural imperfections. The back of the pumpkin is uncarved, showing its natural ribbed texture.
description: A carved jack-o'-lantern pumpkin with a green stem, a playful face, a purple worm, and a melted candle beside it.
description_view_0: The front view shows the carved face with large eyes, a jagged mouth, a purple worm emerging from the left eye, and a melted candle on the right side.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the right side of the pumpkin, the candle more prominently, and the carved face partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the uncarved, ribbed surface of the pumpkin and the full candle standing next to it.
description_view_3: The left side view shows the worm protruding from the pumpkin and the carved features partially visible, with the stem clearly on top.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two large, rounded eyes and a jagged, smiling mouth. The style is whimsical and classic, with a playful expression. There is a cutout for the mouth and eyes, and a purple worm accessory emerging from one eye socket.
